daily.today_energy: Mercury's doing its thing and you're feeling more articulate than usual. Channel this clarity into conversations you've been avoiding—they might surprise you with how smoothly they go.
daily.love: Someone's been thinking about you more than you realize. Whether it's a crush or existing connection, the vibe is shifting toward deeper conversations. Don't ghost your own feelings today.
daily.career: Your intuition about that project or decision is actually spot-on, even if it seems unconventional. Trust your gut and pitch the idea. Your boss might surprise you with how open they are.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement—nothing intense, just flow. A walk, yoga, or dancing to your favorite playlist will reset your nervous system. Hydration matters more today than you'd think.
